displayTitle: Darth Vader by Kieron Gillen & Salvador Larroca Omnibus
synopsis: Collects the complete Darth Vader series from five original trade paperbacks! It includes Darth Vader (2015) #1-25, and a crossover with Vader Down #1 and Star Wars #13-14.
title: Darth Vader by Kieron Gillen & Salvador Larroca Omnibus
